author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Can exchange data with other research teams, even those working on projects at different trial sites.Provides the ability for electronic signatures, making it simpler to get informed approval from study participants and record it.
cons: Time consuming when transferring large data set from the application

description: I have enjoyed using researchmanagers software. As it was the first software I used, this was the software I had the most feeling with. Simultaneously I have used other software due to collaborations with other institutes, but I preferred using researchmanager over these other softwares.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is easy to use and really points itself out. The software uses a user friendly interface allowing for easy data collection. Furthermore it allows for adequate data management by tracking all changes made to the data over time.
cons: No actual points to improve currently. During the time I have used the software, I rarely encountered a bug or serious issue that could not be overcome.

description: The helpdesk is not very keen on providing quick responses on more difficult questions.
author: Marjelle V.
pros: The software is easy to use and has very good export options to work with the data during the trial.
cons: That the monitor options are not so well defined. The query module is very counter intuitive and the pages can only be locked after many steps. The same holds for the monitor option.

description: The best bennefit is the cloud based all in one system for submitting and reviewing any type of study . The system is easily accessible and supports all parties in the assessment of a study. In addition, the system has an archif function where all documents are saved. The approved and the rejected. The minutes and questions from the committee members remain transparent to all parties at all times. If a printout has to be made for overviews of studies or study components, this system is supporting this. You can sort on every detail of/in the application. This saves the secretariat and its staff a lot of time.It is easy to make overviews on request for investigators or for the competent authority when in need.
author: henriette T.
pros: it is easy for investigators to upload their study. They can follow the progress of the descission making process.... The METC has all the docs/letters/review questions/and meeting information in 1 application. The members of the METC have easy acces to the application and they can add their review from any laptop/computer or phone from anywher in the world as long as there is internet.
cons: It some times can be a bit slow , that can be frustrating!

description: I started using the research management to imput some patients information, it let me work remotely with other centers.
author: Stephanie O.
pros: How easy is to imput the information, it really helps me to look and review what other researchers in my project upload.
cons: The company I work with in the USA gave me the oportunity to use it and since the project started I haven't had any issue

review_title: It's a good program, easy to use. I wish the technical support department was more responsive.
description: It's a good program, easy to use. I wish the technical support department was more responsive.
author: Malgorzata K.
pros: that you can easily edit it yourself, I like that as an administrator I can have several studies connected
cons: sometimes the system is not intuitive and you have to look for some tabs

description: Good Experience with lot of learning
author: Neeraj P.
pros: Designing and data entry is faster than other edc
cons: Have some issue with the site adding in the serial number.

description: It does what it's meant for
author: Harm V.
pros: Organizes an essential process of protocol routing
cons: Not all buttons are totally intiutive. It requires some training and experience.

author: Nagma K.
pros: Efficient and Fast data save automatically.
cons: Overall good but for finding all patient data list we need to go to home task.

description: we use it for data collection for scientific studies
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - easy in use - many possibilities - good option to use one database with multiple accounts, even from different companies or hospitals
cons: i have no cons about the software, we use it a lot

author: Bart C.
pros: Prettig programma om mee te werken. Het heeft alle functionaliteit die je nodig hebt voor het uitvoeren en registreren van een klinische trial. Het heeft even tijd nodig om goed opgezet te worden, maar deze tijd win je 10x terug tijdens het uitvoeren van je onderzoek omdat het systeem vervolgens werkt. Snelheid is erg prettig waardoor weinig tot eigenlijk geen frustraties bij het gebruik.
cons: Niet echt een minpunt, maar eerder ook aangehaald. Het duurt even voordat je de dataset heb opgebouwd. Maar de gebruiksvriendelijkheid maakt het erg makkelijk. In vergelijking met andere datamanagment programmas werkt het juist erg prettig.
author_profession: Assistent in opleiding tot specialist AIOS

description: ResearchManager is goed bereikbaar en beantwoordt vragen snel en adequaat. Prettige organisatie.
author: Esther V.
pros: Faciliteiten die ik nodig heb zijn in 1 systmeen geïntegreerd
cons: Bouwen van databases is, zeker voor minder ervaren onderzoekers, niet erg intu"tief

author: Birgit V.
pros: Gebruikersvriendelijkheid, overzichtelijkheid, zelf aanpassingen kunnen maken oftewel leverancier vaak niet nodig, sleepfunctie om documenten te uploaden.
cons: Het niet zelf rapportages kunnen maken.

review_title: Researchmanager gebruikt voor juiste aanlevering gegevens voor clinical trial
author: Eva K.
pros: Overzichtelijk op een rijtje welke documentatie moet worden aangeleverd. Daarnaast het gemak dat wij als bedrijf tesamen met het ziekenhuis waarmee we samenwerken dit overzicht kunnen vullen.
cons: Het gebruikersgemak wat betreft UX en design zou geupdate kunnen worden waardoor alle menu's en updates gemakkelijker te vinden zijn.

author: Jonne P.
pros: gebruiksvriendelijk handige tools om eigen database te maken overzichtelijk dashboard uitgebreide opties tav design eigen database strakke lay-out
cons: geen minpunten ten aanzien van de studies waarvoor ik het gebruikt heb

author: Vincent H.
pros: Gebruiksgemak en klant ondersteuning, Mate waarin we uitleg kregen bij nieuwe gebruikers
cons: nu geen, enige wat ik kan bedenken is dat de prijs hoger is dan gemiddeld maar verder heb ik mij hier te weinig in verdiept

author: Marije V.
pros: I like the overview I have when using the software
cons: extra saving when uploading studydocuments.. when forgotten, the documents have to be attached/uploaded again

author: Wesley T.
pros: Easy to use User friendly Quality for money
cons: Sometimes too many clicks before a certain page is reached.
author_profession: Resident not in training Orthopaedic Surgery

author: Sven V.
pros: Ease of use, no more paperwork. Nice to follow-up studies easily.
cons: Multipel log-ins for multiple centres. Would be nice to have 1 for all.

author: Karen V.
pros: Easy to use, easy to export data (in excel and spss)
cons: Very slow whilst adding new cases. Would be easy to select multiiple (same) answers with one click, instead of multiples.

author: nicolette T.
pros: For monitoring purposes, it is possible to see what documents are at site while not having to go to the sites, which saves travel costs. Also, I can upload documents myself, making sure the investigator site file is always up to date. This saves us all time and makes monitoring time on site much more efficient.
cons: The system is rather slow sometimes also, the search functionality could be improved.

author: Marleen L.
pros: You can adjust the CRF to your prevalences. Webbased, so you can use in anywhere.
cons: No clear overview of all patients you entered to the system. Sometimes only the ones with the ticked boxes, this was very unclear for me at the beginning.

description: Overall experience is good, sending documents to the EC is easier now.
author: Marije V.
pros: It is easier to submit an protocol to the EC
cons: Give every document a letter + number is very annoying..

author: Carlijn S.
pros: The software is clear for users, when uploading documents for a study. It tells you multiple times to save your changes, this is a plus!
cons: If something is not applicable for your study, you still have to fill something in. Which is not always correct.

author: Anne S.
pros: Convinient to use, clean look, straightforward
cons: No cons at this point, but I do not use it on a regular basis
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
